corrections.text: The article credits Space.com with the breakdown 'Exolaunch... deployed 21 CubeSats and 18 MicroSats across two deployment sequences.' Space.com confirms 44 secondary payloads, lists Exolaunch among the launch's operators, and confirms B1071's 33rd flight, but does not contain the specific 21 CubeSats / 18 MicroSats / two deployment sequences breakdown. That detail is from Spaceflight Now's coverage of the same CAS500-2 launch (the same source verified for The Machine Herald's parallel GalaxEye coverage of this rideshare). The article does not cite Spaceflight Now. The content is accurate; only the source citation is mis-targeted.
